_README: Korea manual-entry store (KOFIA margin loans / deposits / CMA / KOSPI / KR 3Y yields + CSOP 7709 units). Written by api/korea-save.js (dashboard paste → GitHub commit); read server-side by the Pre-Read and dashboard. `latest` = current value per field (raw units: 백만원 for currency, % for yields, points for KOSPI, integer for 7709 units) + its own asOf. `history` = append-only snapshots for the trend view. Do not hand-edit unless fixing a bad save.
